en: I can't be honest.
Tell you what, I would prefer loyalty.
What was our deal when we first got together?
ko: 우리가 처음 만났을 때의 약속이 뭐였지?

en: Brutal truth, remember?
I think you added the brutal.
ko: 너가 잔인한 부분을 추가한 것 같아.

en: Jerry, there is a sensitivity thing that some people have. I don't have it.
ko: 제리, 어떤 사람들은 민감한 부분이 있어. 나는 그런 게 없어.

en: I don't cry at movies.
I don't gush over babies.
I don't start celebrating Christmas five months early.
ko: 나는 크리스마스를 다섯 달 일찍 축하하지 않아.

en: And I don't tell a man who just screwed up both our lives. Oh, poor baby.
ko: 그리고 나는 우리 둘의 인생을 망친 남자에게 "아, 불쌍한 아기"라고 말하지 않아.

en: That's me, for better or worse.
But I do love you.
Avery.
No. It's over. Didn't hear it.
There's something missing here, don't you think?
ko: 여기 뭔가 빠진 것 같지 않아? 너는 한 번도 혼자가 아니었어. 내 말을 들어.

en: You have never been alone. Listen to me.
ko: 너는 결코 혼자가 아니었어. 내 말을 들어.

en: And you can't be alone.
ko: 그리고 너는 혼자가 될 수 없어.

en: It's over.
No one has ever dumped me.
I'm not trying to make history here.
ko: 나는 여기서 역사를 만들려고 하는 게 아니야.

en: I did the 23 hours.
